title: calls to sys.generate_series should auto-convert arguments
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_series (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value INT NOT NULL);

INSERT INTO test_series (id, value) SELECT id, id FROM (SELECT @rownum := @rownum + 1 AS id FROM (SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10) AS temp, (SELECT @rownum := 0) AS r) AS series;
CREATE TABLE test_data (data_id INT, data_value VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT chk_data_value CHECK (data_value <> ''));

INSERT INTO test_data (data_id, data_value) SELECT id, CONCAT('Value ', id) FROM (SELECT @rownum := @rownum + 1 AS id FROM (SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5) AS temp, (SELECT @rownum := 0) AS r) AS series;
SELECT t.id, t.value, d.data_value FROM test_series t JOIN test_data d ON t.id = d.data_id WHERE t.value IS NOT NULL;
